nodes.grounding_span: I always double check—I'd never trust AI to accurately know the separate sounds of words by itself

nodes.label: Personalized adaptive teaching vs. AI's 'normal' answers
nodes.grounding_span: My lesson plans aren't 'normal,' and they're fluid—changing based on last lesson and how the child is feeling today

nodes.label: Confidence in human irreplaceability
nodes.grounding_span: I'm never worried about some AI learning platform taking over my job
